name: io.github.chrassy/klanex
title: klanex
description: Reliable async execution for agent tool calls: schema-gate payloads, absorb rate limits and outages with retries and circuit breakers, idempotency, human approval gates, encrypted credentials, replay, and audit trail.

headers.name: X-API-Key
headers.description: klanex API key (klx_live_... for production; free klx_test_... sandbox keys work at https://api.sandbox.klanexai.com/mcp)

environmentVariables.name: KLANEX_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: klanex API key; klx_test_... keys route to the sandbox automatically
